effort_complexity.rationale: Deterministic render of board.json + slice records into a fixed Markdown layout; new files only, no model dispatch.

design_decisions.choice: Renderer decodes board.json via canonical strict board.ReadBoard (object-only release), with an os.Stat pre-guard that fails closed on a missing board.json instead of triggering ReadBoard's lazy migration from index.md
options: canonical strict board.ReadBoard against the object-form board (CHOSEN)
local tolerant renderBoard decoder accepting string-or-object release (REJECTED)
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach authorised and executed the S05 AC-06 cutover (2026-07-01): this release's board.json migrated string->object and canonical strict sworn installed globally. Renderer therefore uses the single strict reader; a second tolerant decode path is rejected (S05 AC-03: legacy string boards are migrated, not read-tolerated).
design_decisions.rationale: One board-decode path in the codebase; AC-04/AC-05 are consistent as written once the board is object-form; avoids the reader-divergence surface (feedback_releaseverify_specmd_false_fail). The reader choice is invisible to the delivery Verifier, so Rule 9 fixes it in design.

reachability_artifacts: sworn render 2026-06-30-sworn-operational-readiness <worktree> (exit 0) regenerated docs/release/2026-06-30-sworn-operational-readiness/index.md replacing the hand-authored file: tracks table contains T1-operational-unblock + T2-board-render (all 5 tracks), touchpoint matrix 31 file rows 0 collisions (disjoint), single-quoted frontmatter; re-render byte-identical (idempotent). Captured in proof.md Reachability.
